source: Fresh TASK-080 implementation loop from validated SPRINT-003 planning context.

task.title: Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence
task.summary: Strengthen validation gateway profiles so required audits, graph context, fresh isolation, and content proof are enforced by build kind and change class.

goal.outcome: Gateways block when required audit evidence, graph context, fresh isolation, or content-proof refs are missing for sensitive boundaries.
acceptance: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.
non_goals: Do not implement remote push/release automation.
Do not replace deterministic tests with non-deterministic validation.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: TASK-080 gateway validation now declares required audit profiles, blocks pass reports without required audit evidence, and stores content-proof refs separately from validator attestation metadata.

evidence: Updated validation smoke callers to provide required audit_refs for pass paths.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added gateway audit profile requirement constants and audit evidence gap enforcement in src/application/builds.ts.
Added validation report audit_refs/audit_reports/content_proof_refs output and schema/type support.
Extended graph content-proof indexing for isolation archive_ref and remote_ref.
notes: Scope stayed on TASK-080 gateway policy enforcement; no /audit command or source-owned audit engine work was taken from TASK-079.
Audit evidence enforcement currently validates declared refs/profile tokens; actual source-owned audit engine output remains dependent on TASK-079.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Updated validation smoke callers to provide required audit_refs for pass paths.
code_change_evidence: Added gateway audit profile requirement constants and audit evidence gap enforcement in src/application/builds.ts.
Added validation report audit_refs/audit_reports/content_proof_refs output and schema/type support.
Extended graph content-proof indexing for isolation archive_ref and remote_ref.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/builds.ts defines default audit requirements for feedback, documentation, planning, implementation, task-close, publication/publish/release, drift-audit, and graph-audit; build policy emits required_audits; tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs asserts implementation policy required_audits.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Existing isolation/content-proof enforcement remains in src/application/builds.ts; tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs and tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs cover implementation dirty digest pass, task-close/publication dirty digest block, and publication immutable proof pass.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/builds.ts writes content_proof_refs from isolation proof fields separately from isolation attestation; src/application/graph.ts indexes isolation archive_ref/remote_ref as content proof; tests assert content_proof_refs for validated_sha.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs asserts missing audit evidence blocks with failed_criteria=audit_evidence and that valid audit_refs plus content proof pass; targeted smoke checks passed.

closure_brief.user_intent: Finish or advance TASK-080 gateway policy enforcement without taking over TASK-079/TASK-081/TASK-087.
implemented_changes: Declared required audit profile policy by validation context.
Blocked pass validation reports when required audit evidence refs are missing.
Emitted validation audit/content-proof fields separately from isolation attestation metadata.
Added targeted smoke coverage for missing audit evidence and valid audit/content-proof pass paths.
acceptance_evidence: Required audit declarations emitted in implementation build policy and validation reports.
Missing audit evidence blocks with failed_criteria=audit_evidence.
Valid implementation/task-close/publication reports pass/block according to content-proof policy.
non_goals_preserved: Did not implement /audit command or source-owned audit engine.
Did not close TASK-080 without task-close validation/commit proof.
remaining_risks: TASK-079 must supply canonical audit engine output for audit_refs/audit_reports.

risks: TASK-079 source-owned audit engine is still required before audit_refs can be generated by the canonical /audit engine instead of supplied as explicit validation evidence.
Task not closed; task-close validation and commit/tree proof were not produced in this builder loop.

restore.note: Restored history is reference material until promoted into active knowledge or roadmap truth.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-080 Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence implementation evidence
commit.body:
TASK-080 gateway validation now declares required audit profiles, blocks pass reports without required audit evidence, and stores content-proof refs separately from validator attestation metadata.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node ./tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs && node ./tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
